test.name: TC-12 : Create New Draft Booking For Tracking AND Search Tracking By Booking ID with Date to TMO and default

kw.name: Run Keywords
kw.arg: Login To System As Shipping User
kw.doc: Executes all the given keywords in a sequence.

kw.name: Login To System As Shipping User
New Browser
kw.doc: Create a new playwright Browser with specified options.
kw.msg: {"browser": "chromium", "headless": false, "chromiumSandbox": false, "devtools": false, "handleSIGHUP": true, "handleSIGINT": true, "handleSIGTERM": true, "slowMo": 0.0, "timeout": 30000.0, "tracesDir": "C:\\Users\\iTservice\\Document\\FEMS_AutomationTest\\testsuite\\Shipping\\SHIPPING04_TrackingBooking\\output\\browser\\traces\\temp\\6b408ed6-f7ae-4910-91b5-8fb2aeb461cb"}

kw.name: New Page
kw.doc: Open a new Page.
kw.msg: Successfully initialized new page object and opened url: https://uataotfems.netbay.co.th/fems/#/auth/shipping/login
No context was open. New context was automatically opened when this page is created.

kw.doc: Sets the timeout used by most input and getter keywords.

kw.name: Set Variable
kw.arg: xpath=(//div[contains(@class, "card-content") and ./span[text()="Date to TMO"] and contains(., "${expected_date}")])[1]
kw.doc: Returns the given values which can then be assigned to a variables.

kw.name: Wait For Elements State
kw.doc: Waits for the element found by ``selector`` to satisfy state option.
kw.msg: Waited for Element with selector xpath=//a[text()="202605080029"]/ancestor::div[contains(@class, "card")]//span[text()="Date to TMO"]/following-sibling::text()[contains(., "19/06/26")]/.. at state visible

kw.name: Get Element Count
kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.arg: \n[INFO] Verified Date ${expected_date} for Booking ${target_booking_id}: Found ${count} record(s)
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=❌ ข้อมูลวันที่ไม่ถูกต้อง หรือไม่พบข้อมูลที่ตรงตามเงื่อนไข
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.doc: Returns the count of elements found with ``selector``.

kw.name: Log To Console
kw.doc: Logs the given message to the console.

kw.name: Should Be True
kw.arg: msg=❌ ไม่พบรายการที่ตรงกับ HAWB: ${target_hawb}
kw.doc: Fails if the given condition is not true.

kw.name: Vertify and Count Search Result By Vehicle Plate
Sleep
kw.doc: Pauses the test executed for the given time.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

test.doc: สร้าง booking ใหม่จากนั้น tracking ด้วย Bookingid DATE_To_TMO เเล้วใช้ค่าที่ตั้งมาอยู่เเล้ว
